title: Task Inbox File
description: One JSON file per task in _tasks/inbox. Consumer (Watchdog/task runner) parses type and payload only; no natural language.

id.description: Unique task id, e.g. {Utc timestamp}_{process_id} or UUID

type.description: Task type: research, ingest, refresh_file_index, verify-integrity, or TASK_TYPES_EXTRA names

priority.description: Optional; lower = higher priority for ordering
